# The Document Index

> The living index of document-AI tooling — OCR, PDF extraction, document parsing, layout
> & structure, table extraction and vision-language understanding — ranked daily by GitHub momentum.

Updated: 2026-06-16T15:35:11.764068+00:00
Tools indexed: 196

## Top document-AI tools by momentum

- [PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR](https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR) — momentum 87, ⭐82450 — OCR Engines — Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI. A powerful, lightweight OCR toolkit
- [tesseract-ocr/tesseract](https://github.com/tesseract-ocr/tesseract) — momentum 86, ⭐74755 — OCR Engines — Tesseract Open Source OCR Engine (main repository)
- [opendatalab/MinerU](https://github.com/opendatalab/MinerU) — momentum 86, ⭐67741 — Document Parsing — Transforms complex documents like PDFs and Office docs into LLM-ready markdown/JSON for your Agentic
- [docling-project/docling](https://github.com/docling-project/docling) — momentum 86, ⭐61680 — Document Parsing — Get your documents ready for gen AI
- [ocrmypdf/OCRmyPDF](https://github.com/ocrmypdf/OCRmyPDF) — momentum 82, ⭐33899 — OCR Engines — OCRmyPDF adds an OCR text layer to scanned PDF files, allowing them to be searched
- [datalab-to/marker](https://github.com/datalab-to/marker) — momentum 81, ⭐36141 — PDF Extraction — Convert PDF to markdown + JSON quickly with high accuracy
- [opendataloader-project/opendataloader-pdf](https://github.com/opendataloader-project/opendataloader-pdf) — momentum 81, ⭐25159 — PDF Extraction — PDF Parser for AI-ready data. Automate PDF accessibility. Open-source.

- [Zipstack/unstract](https://github.com/Zipstack/unstract) — momentum 75, ⭐6662 — Document Parsing — LLM-Driven Extraction of Unstructured Data — Built for API Deployments & ETL Pipeline Workflows
